text: Why do you feel guilty doing nothing? Honestly, it's not even you. A few hundred years ago, as factories took over, a new idea got sold. Hard work is holy, and rest is wasted time. So, resting got quietly rebranded as a moral failure. That guilt in your chest is basically a very old sales pitch, but that's only half the story.

but that's only half the story.
